role: Co-founder of Freedom Movement of Iran; revolutionary cleric
bio: Liberal Shia cleric who co-founded the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) alongside [Mehdi Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan) and [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi). Imprisoned multiple times (4 arrests, over 11 years total) under the Pahlavi regime. Served in the provisional government after the [1979 revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Known for progressive interpretations of Islam and support for democratic governance. Elected as Tehran's first representative to the [Islamic Consultative Assembly](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly). Died 9 September 1979, shortly after the revolution.
editorial_notes: Died September 1979, just months after the revolution. Suspicious circumstances alleged by some.
